# Content Syndicate

> High-authority press release distribution with transparent, pay-as-you-go pricing from $295. Target your press releases to the media and influencers that matter, with placements across AP News, Business Insider, MarketWatch, Yahoo Finance, and 500+ outlets.

Content Syndicate is a press release distribution platform serving public companies, private companies, startups, agencies, and brands. Releases are syndicated across tier-1 financial media and a broad network of consumer and industry outlets, with Google News indexing included on every tier. Custom BeSpoke campaigns are available for projects that need more than a single release.

## Services

- Solutions: https://contentsyndicate.net/solutions
- BeSpoke Custom Campaigns: https://contentsyndicate.net/bespoke
- Newsroom: https://contentsyndicate.net/newsroom
- Pricing: https://contentsyndicate.net/pricing
- Contact Us: https://contentsyndicate.net/contact

## Pricing

- Pro: $295 per release. Yahoo Finance, Street Insider, Benzinga, Google indexing.
- Elite: $395 per release. Business Insider, Barchart, Street Insider, 300+ placements.
- Disclosure: $495 per release. Pro circuit, AP News, Business Insider, MarketWatch, 500+ placements.
- BeSpoke: Custom pricing for multi-platform campaigns.

## Partners

- BlockchainWire: https://blockchainwire.io
- CryptoBell.Live: https://cryptobell.live

## Audiences

- Public and private companies announcing earnings, launches, partnerships, and disclosures
- Startups raising capital or launching products
- Agencies managing multi-client press distribution
- Professional services firms, consumer brands, and local businesses

## Contact

- Sales: sales@contentsyndicate.net
- Contact page: https://contentsyndicate.net/contact
- Get started: https://admin.contentsyndicate.net/signup
- Log in: https://admin.contentsyndicate.net/signin
